slides.title: Platform Access and Dashboard
slides.subtitle: Login, navigation and real-time command centre.

slides.title: Secure Authentication
slides.body: DALP supports passwordless passkey login alongside email/password. Access is role-gated from the first click, ensuring only authorised participants reach the platform. Every action performed through this screen is permanently recorded on the immutable blockchain ledger. All DALP operations run on Hyperledger Besu and compatible EVM networks, ensuring regulated financial instruments benefit from cryptographic guarantees alongside permissioned access controls.
